name: tree-sitter-funpack
description: tree-sitter grammars for the funpack file-type family (.fun/.fcfg/.fpm/.flvl/.fui/.tiles/.atlas/.manifest)

scripts.generate: for d in $IMPLEMENTED; do (cd "$d" && tree-sitter generate) || exit 1; done
scripts.test: for d in $IMPLEMENTED; do (cd "$d" && tree-sitter generate && tree-sitter test) || exit 1; done

config.note: IMPLEMENTED is set by the Taskfile / validation gate to the list of grammar dirs that are fully implemented (fun fcfg). Stub dirs are excluded.
